markdown_summary:
## test (6 records, updated 118d ago)

### Conventions
- [mx-c0n111] Always use `records` not `entries` in user-facing strings. [relates to: mx-pat222; supersedes: mx-old001]

### Patterns
- [mx-pat222] **atomic-writes**: Write to temp file then rename to prevent partial JSONL. (src/utils/expertise.ts, src/utils/lock.ts)

### Known Failures
- [mx-fai333] AJV strict mode rejects schemas missing `type: object`.
  â†’ Add `type: "object"` alongside `required` and `properties`.

### Decisions
- [mx-dec444] **Singleton registry over DI**: DI ripples through ~30 files; singleton with lazy fallback is pragmatic. [relates to: mx-pat222, mx-ref555]

### References
- [mx-ref555] **AJV docs**: Reference for JSON-schema validation library. (node_modules/ajv/README.md)

### Guides
- [mx-gui666] **How to add a custom record type**: Phase 2 step-by-step for declaring custom_types in mulch.config.yaml.

## test (6 records, updated 118d ago)

### Conventions
- [mx-c0n111] Always use `records` not `entries` in user-facing strings. (foundational) [commit: abc1234, file: src/cli.ts] [tags: style, cli] [relates to: mx-pat222; supersedes: mx-old001]

### Patterns
- [mx-pat222] **atomic-writes**: Write to temp file then rename to prevent partial JSONL. (src/utils/expertise.ts, src/utils/lock.ts) (foundational) [commit: def5678, date: 2026-01-02, issue: mulch-100] [tags: concurrency]

### Known Failures
- [mx-fai333] AJV strict mode rejects schemas missing `type: object`. (tactical) [commit: fai0001]
  â†’ Add `type: "object"` alongside `required` and `properties`.

### Decisions
- [mx-dec444] **Singleton registry over DI**: DI ripples through ~30 files; singleton with lazy fallback is pragmatic. (foundational) [tags: architecture, v0.8.0] [relates to: mx-pat222, mx-ref555]

### References
- [mx-ref555] **AJV docs**: Reference for JSON-schema validation library. (node_modules/ajv/README.md) (observational)

### Guides
- [mx-gui666] **How to add a custom record type**: Phase 2 step-by-step for declaring custom_types in mulch.config.yaml. (tactical) [commit: gui0001]

<domain name="test" entries="6" updated="118d ago">
  <convention id="mx-c0n111" classification="foundational">
    Always use `records` not `entries` in user-facing strings.
    <tags>style, cli</tags>
    <relates_to>mx-pat222</relates_to>
    <supersedes>mx-old001</supersedes>
    <outcome status="success" duration="42" agent="claude"></outcome>
    <outcome status="success"></outcome>
  </convention>
  <pattern id="mx-pat222" classification="foundational">
    <name>atomic-writes</name>
    <description>Write to temp file then rename to prevent partial JSONL.</description>
    <files>src/utils/expertise.ts, src/utils/lock.ts</files>
    <tags>concurrency</tags>
  </pattern>
  <failure id="mx-fai333" classification="tactical">
    <description>AJV strict mode rejects schemas missing `type: object`.</description>
    <resolution>Add `type: "object"` alongside `required` and `properties`.</resolution>
    <outcome status="partial"></outcome>
  </failure>
  <decision id="mx-dec444" classification="foundational">
    <title>Singleton registry over DI</title>
    <rationale>DI ripples through ~30 files; singleton with lazy fallback is pragmatic.</rationale>
    <tags>architecture, v0.8.0</tags>
    <relates_to>mx-pat222, mx-ref555</relates_to>
  </decision>
  <reference id="mx-ref555" classification="observational">
    <name>AJV docs</name>
    <description>Reference for JSON-schema validation library.</description>
    <files>node_modules/ajv/README.md</files>
  </reference>
  <guide id="mx-gui666" classification="tactical">
    <name>How to add a custom record type</name>
    <description>Phase 2 step-by-step for declaring custom_types in mulch.config.yaml.</description>
    <outcome status="failure" agent="tester">5/8 passed</outcome>
  </guide>
</domain>

[test] 6 records (updated 118d ago)

Conventions:
  - [mx-c0n111] Always use `records` not `entries` in user-facing strings. [relates to: mx-pat222; supersedes: mx-old001]

Patterns:
  - [mx-pat222] atomic-writes: Write to temp file then rename to prevent partial JSONL. (src/utils/expertise.ts, src/utils/lock.ts)

Known Failures:
  - [mx-fai333] AJV strict mode rejects schemas missing `type: object`.
    Fix: Add `type: "object"` alongside `required` and `properties`.

Decisions:
  - [mx-dec444] Singleton registry over DI: DI ripples through ~30 files; singleton with lazy fallback is pragmatic. [relates to: mx-pat222, mx-ref555]

References:
  - [mx-ref555] AJV docs: Reference for JSON-schema validation library. (node_modules/ajv/README.md)

Guides:
  - [mx-gui666] How to add a custom record type: Phase 2 step-by-step for declaring custom_types in mulch.config.yaml.

AJV strict mode rejects schemas missing `type: object`.
